name: Cat Fact Incident Automation
description: Flow that runs on incident insert, fetches a cat fact from catfact.ninja API, adds it as a comment, assigns to random ITIL user, and roasts them in work notes

actions.name: Get Cat Fact
actions.description: Fetch a random cat fact from catfact.ninja

actions.name: Get Priority Modifier
actions.description: Get priority-based modifier for the cat fact

actions.name: Add Cat Fact Comment
actions.description: Add the cat fact as a comment to the incident

data.comments: [${Get Priority Modifier.priority_modifier}] CAT FACT: ${Get Cat Fact.cat_fact}

actions.name: Get Random ITIL User
actions.description: Query and select a random active ITIL user

actions.name: Generate Roast
Assign and Add Roast
actions.description: Assign incident to random ITIL user and add roast to work notes

data.work_notes: ASSIGNMENT ROAST for ${Get Random ITIL User.assigned_user_name}: ${Generate Roast.roast_message}

actions.name: No ITIL User Fallback
actions.description: Add work note if no ITIL users found

data.work_notes: No ITIL users found for random assignment. The cat facts remain, but the roast must wait.
